title: Tren Ban Nhau Duoi Ban Muu
original_title: Trên Bàn Nhậu Dưới Bàn Mưu
overview: On the Drinking Table Under the Conspiracy Table is a story about the interesting friendship of a group of close friends. In their journey to find their dreams and life plans, they were accidentally pulled into a dark, unwanted plot. The ignorance of Rice (Dieu Nhi), the clumsiness of Du Lai (Kha Nhu) and the hot temper of Trieu (Thuy Ngan), combined with the overbearing initiatives of Tri (Kieu Minh Tuan), have brought about A unique "revenge" for Truc (Tran Ngoc Vang) - a super cheater masquerading as a businessman and also the one who caused Gao a lot of trouble.
